title: Air-fryer sweet potato fries
subtitle: Crisp-edged fries without the softening problem
excerpt: Sweet potato fries tossed in cornflour and smoked paprika before cooking in the air fryer at 200°C for 15 to 18 minutes. The cornflour absorbs surface moisture and creates a dry coating that crisps in the heat. Without it, the high sugar content of sweet potato produces a soft, caramelised result instead of a crisp one.
sourceNotes: Sweet potato fries became popular in British restaurants and pubs from the 2000s as an alternative to regular chips. The main challenge is that sweet potato contains more sugar and moisture than regular potato, which means it caramelises and softens rather than crisping at high heat. The cornflour coating, used in Asian cooking to produce crisp textures on fried foods, solves this problem.

content.text: Do not skip the cornflour. Sweet potato has a much higher moisture and sugar content than regular potato. The cornflour coating absorbs the surface moisture before cooking begins, giving the air fryer something dry to crisp rather than a sugar-rich surface that will caramelise and soften. One tablespoon is enough for 600g of fries.

items.prepNote: peeled and cut into fries about 1 cm thick

content.text: Pat the {{sweet-potato}} fries dry with kitchen paper. Toss in {{cornflour}} until evenly coated, then add {{olive-oil}}, {{smoked-paprika}}, {{sea-salt-fine}}, and {{black-pepper}} and toss again. Preheat the air fryer to 200°C for 3 minutes. Spread the fries in a single layer in the basket. Cook at 200°C for 15 to 18 minutes, shaking the basket once at the 8-minute mark. They are done when the edges are crisp and slightly darkened and the centres are soft when pierced. Serve immediately: sweet potato fries soften as they cool and do not hold their crunch for long.

items.symptom: Fries soft and caramelised rather than crisp
items.cause: Cornflour skipped, or fries not dried before coating
items.fix: Pat the sweet potato completely dry before adding the cornflour. If the surface is wet, the cornflour turns into a paste rather than a dry coating. Use the full tablespoon even if it seems like a lot

items.symptom: Fries sticking together in the basket
items.cause: Basket overcrowded, or fries not shaken
items.fix: Sweet potato fries need space to cook rather than steam. Cook in a single layer even if it means two batches. Shake at the 8-minute mark and separate any that have stuck

items.symptom: Edges burning before the centre is cooked through
items.cause: Fries cut too thin, or temperature too high
items.fix: Cut to at least 1 cm thick. Very thin fries cook in 10 to 12 minutes. Reduce to 190°C if the edges are darkening too fast

content.text: Air-fryer sweet potato fries are a side dish for burgers, grilled chicken, or a bean chilli. They work best served immediately while the cornflour coating is still crisp. A dipping sauce of sriracha mixed with mayonnaise is the natural pairing.
